tasks.subject: Build Sprint 2: Google Data Integration
tasks.description: Build the Python FastAPI backend, headless pi bridge, and connect frontend widgets to real Google data. Includes: FastAPI backend with CORS, SQLite persistence, headless pi subprocess bridge, Google OAuth, real data endpoints for Gmail/Calendar/Tasks/Drive, frontend data fetching with loading/error states, manual refresh per component, and simultaneous startup fetch.

tasks.subject: Build Sprint 3: AI Assistant
tasks.description: Build the floating AI chat widget with AG-UI streaming, A2UI component generation, data-aware answers, and web research. Includes: floating chat widget in bottom-right, AG-UI streaming over SSE, A2UI component generation on demand, AI answers about user data, web research via Playwright CLI, prompt field per component, and chat history.

tasks.subject: Build Sprint 4: AI Designer Mode
tasks.description: Build AI Designer Mode with three permission levels (Suggest & Approve, Auto-Apply with Undo, Full Control), AI layout suggestion engine, blueprint/diff format for changes, undo stack, and toggle switch.

tasks.subject: Build Sprint 5: Polish & Themes
tasks.description: Build 5 pre-built themes, per-component custom styling, global theme system, SQLite persistence for all data, responsive layout, and keyboard shortcuts.

tasks.subject: Fix Google data loading in backend
tasks.description:
The backend pi_bridge.py is trying to spawn pi CLI in a non-existent 'non-interactive' mode. The correct approach is to use the stored Google OAuth tokens and call Google APIs directly via HTTP. Need to:
1. Rewrite pi_bridge.py to use stored tokens and call Google REST APIs
2. Update data.py endpoints to use the new bridge
3. Test that real data flows through to the frontend
